original:
---
name: sisyphus-junior-agent
description: Developer reference for the Sisyphus-Junior category-spawned executor agent -- model variants and discipline.
---
zh_tw:
---
name: sisyphus-junior-agent
description: Sisyphus-Junior 類別派生執行器代理的開發者參考 -- 模型變體與紀律。
---

original: 10 files. Sisyphus-Junior is a focused task executor spawned by `delegate-task` when category routing requires it. Runs in subagent mode with its own fallback chain. Does not delegate further; executes directly.
zh_tw: 10 個檔案。Sisyphus-Junior 是一個專注的任務執行器，當類別路由需要時，會由 `delegate-task` 派生。以 subagent 模式執行，並使用自己的回退鏈。不會進一步委派；直接執行。

original:
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `agent.ts` | `createSisyphusJuniorAgentWithOverrides()` factory, model-variant routing, `SISYPHUS_JUNIOR_DEFAULTS` |
| `index.ts` | Barrel exports |
| `default.ts` | Base/Claude prompt: todo discipline, verification, termination rules |
| `gemini.ts` | Gemini-optimized prompt variant |
| `gpt.ts` | Base GPT prompt variant |
| `gpt-5-3-codex.ts` | GPT-5.3 Codex prompt variant |
| `gpt-5-4.ts` | GPT-5.4-native prompt variant |
| `gpt-5-5.ts` | GPT-5.5-native prompt variant |
| `kimi-k2-6.ts` | Kimi K2.6 prompt variant |
| `index.test.ts` | Unit tests |
zh_tw:
| 檔案 | 用途 |
|------|---------|
| `agent.ts` | `createSisyphusJuniorAgentWithOverrides()` 工廠、模型變體路由、`SISYPHUS_JUNIOR_DEFAULTS` |
| `index.ts` | 匯出集合 |
| `default.ts` | 基礎/Claude 提示詞：待辦紀律、驗證、終止規則 |
| `gemini.ts` | Gemini 最佳化提示詞變體 |
| `gpt.ts` | 基礎 GPT 提示詞變體 |
| `gpt-5-3-codex.ts` | GPT-5.3 Codex 提示詞變體 |
| `gpt-5-4.ts` | GPT-5.4 原生提示詞變體 |
| `gpt-5-5.ts` | GPT-5.5 原生提示詞變體 |
| `kimi-k2-6.ts` | Kimi K2.6 提示詞變體 |
| `index.test.ts` | 單元測試 |

original:
Parent `agent.ts` selects prompt variant by model name:
- Contains "kimi-k2" -> `kimi-k2-6.ts`
- Contains "gpt-5.5" -> `gpt-5-5.ts`
- Contains "gpt-5.4" -> `gpt-5-4.ts`
- Contains "gpt-5.3-codex" -> `gpt-5-3-codex.ts`
- Contains "gpt" -> `gpt.ts`
- Contains "gemini" -> `gemini.ts`
- Default -> `default.ts` (Claude, GLM, etc.)
zh_tw:
父層 `agent.ts` 會依模型名稱選擇提示詞變體：
- 包含 "kimi-k2" -> `kimi-k2-6.ts`
- 包含 "gpt-5.5" -> `gpt-5-5.ts`
- 包含 "gpt-5.4" -> `gpt-5-4.ts`
- 包含 "gpt-5.3-codex" -> `gpt-5-3-codex.ts`
- 包含 "gpt" -> `gpt.ts`
- 包含 "gemini" -> `gemini.ts`
- 預設 -> `default.ts`（Claude、GLM 等）

original:
- Mode: `subagent` (uses own fallback chain, ignores UI selection)
- Default model: `claude-sonnet-4-6`
- Default temperature: `0.1` (`SISYPHUS_JUNIOR_DEFAULTS`)
- Fallback chain: kimi-k2.6 -> gpt-5.5 medium -> minimax-m2.7 -> big-pickle
- Blocked tools: `task` (all models); `apply_patch` also blocked for GPT models
- `call_omo_agent` explicitly allowed so subagents can spawn explore/librarian
- Max tokens: 64000
- Thinking enabled for non-GPT/non-GLM models (budgetTokens: 32000)
- Reasoning effort "medium" for GPT models
zh_tw:
- 模式：`subagent`（使用自己的回退鏈，忽略 UI 選擇）
- 預設模型：`claude-sonnet-4-6`
- 預設 temperature：`0.1`（`SISYPHUS_JUNIOR_DEFAULTS`）
- 回退鏈：kimi-k2.6 -> gpt-5.5 medium -> minimax-m2.7 -> big-pickle
- 被阻擋的工具：`task`（所有模型）；`apply_patch` 也會對 GPT 模型阻擋
- 明確允許 `call_omo_agent`，因此 subagents 可以派生 explore/librarian
- 最大 tokens：64000
- 對非 GPT／非 GLM 模型啟用 thinking（budgetTokens: 32000）
- GPT 模型的 reasoning effort 為 "medium"
